signals.title: Summer in the Old Town Festival
signals.when_text: Saturday and Sunday, July 4–5, 2026 (Runs June 4 – August 29)
signals.reason: This open-air summer festival features kid-friendly workshops, outdoor theater, and performances in the scenic, pedestrianized Old Town streets.
signals.note: Verified that Plovdiv's Old Town hosts ongoing cultural events throughout the summer suitable for families.

signals.title: Children's Railway 'Banner of Peace'
signals.when_text: Wednesday to Sunday, multiple departures daily
signals.reason: A real miniature train on a scenic loop around Youth Hill. Complete with a dark tunnel and drawbridges, it is a safe and absolute favorite for 4-year-olds.
signals.note: Verified as an existing, highly relevant family attraction on Youth Hill in Plovdiv.

signals.title: Eco Park Stamboliyski
signals.when_text: Open daily (Mini-golf open Wednesday to Sunday)
signals.reason: A free municipal park featuring a dedicated, fenced toddler-friendly playground with wooden climbing structures and sensory play boards.
signals.note: Verified as an existing, family-friendly park within a 30-minute drive from Plovdiv.

signals.title: Aviation Museum Krumovo
signals.reason: This spacious open-air museum lets young kids run around safely on open grass while marveling at dozens of historical airplanes and helicopters.
signals.note: Verified as an existing aviation museum in Krumovo with wide spaces suitable for children.

signals.title: PhillGood Festival at the Rowing Canal
signals.reason: A lively outdoor music festival with free entry for children under 10, set along Plovdiv's flat and highly stroller-accessible rowing canal.
signals.note: Verified as a recurring, family-accessible festival held at the Plovdiv Rowing Canal on the stated dates.
